title: Predictive Maintenance for Machines
description: Built a machine learning system to predict equipment breakdowns using sensor data, enabling proactive maintenance and reducing operational downtime.
problem: Unplanned machine failures were causing frequent downtime and increased maintenance costs.
approach: Cleaned and preprocessed 5,000+ rows of sensor data
Performed exploratory data analysis to identify key features
Trained and tuned a Random Forest Regressor model
outcome: Achieved approximately 20% reduction in machine downtime by enabling predictive maintenance scheduling.

title: Nyaya Bot – AI Legal Assistant
description: Developed an AI-powered chatbot that provides simplified legal guidance based on Indian law datasets.
problem: Legal information is difficult for non-experts to access and understand quickly.
approach: Trained chatbot on 3,000+ legal data points
Designed conversational flows for common legal scenarios
Integrated Gemini API for natural language understanding
outcome: Made the rightful knowledge of law accessible on fingertips of the user.

title: Sales Analysis Dashboard
description: Created an interactive business intelligence dashboard to analyze historical sales performance and trends.
problem: Sales teams lacked visibility into regional performance, payment trends, and quarterly growth.
approach: Built Power BI dashboard with filters and drilldowns
Visualized state-wise sales, quarterly trends, and payment methods
outcome: Enabled data-driven decisions for sales strategy and inventory planning.

title: Gesture Recognition System (In Progress)
description: Developing a real-time hand gesture recognition system for touchless interaction and accessibility.
problem: Traditional input devices limit accessibility and natural human-computer interaction.
approach: Used OpenCV and MediaPipe for hand tracking
Training CNN models to classify gestures
outcome: Working prototype with improving accuracy for predefined gestures.
